content:
此枪，预告我的到来。
肆意焚烧吧！把这罪恶的一切，全部摧毁！

——✦——✦—— ✦✦✦ ——✦——✦——

Bang! Hear that? That’s my hello.
Set the fire loose! Hell’s taking receipts tonight!

thread_title: V2.3.1 全新唤醒体✦凯蒂古拉┊New Awakener✦Kathigu-Ra

content:
贫瘠的黄沙带走了这座小镇最后一丝人性：
在这里，死亡是神最后施予的怜悯；
在这里，生命的重量轻过一袋食粮；
在这里，新生将注定承受无尽苦难。

“神…啊…求求……你……救救我吧……”
“你是……谁……”
“可怜的████啊，想报仇么？拿起它，然后将他们对你做的事加倍奉还。”
劈砍、尖啸、眼泪、血液…破败的屋内充斥着孩童最直白的报复。
半晌过后，女孩背起断足的孩子向门外走去。意外的重量让女孩有些后悔刚才的逞强，不过嘛…这样子靠在一起，也意外的挺暖和…

——✦——✦—— ✦✦✦ ——✦——✦——

The barren yellow sands had stolen this town’s last shred of humanity:
Here, death was the final mercy granted by the gods;
Here, a life weighed less than a sack of grain;
Here, every newborn was doomed to endless suffering.

"Lord... please... save... me..."
"Who... are you...?"
"Poor ████, do you seek vengeance? Take this, then. Repay them double for what they did to you."

Hacking, screams, tears, blood—the ruined house seethed with a child’s primal retribution.
After a long while, the girl lifted the footless child and trudged toward the door. The weight made her regret her earlier bravado—but then again... huddled like this, it was oddly warm...

@everyone
